decks.notes: This deck focuses on fast and aggressive play, utilizing cheap and efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and powerful spells like Lightning Bolt to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By manipulating the top cards of the library with cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration, this deck aims to maintain consistent pressure and card advantage. With a mix of burn spells and pump spells like Mutagenic Growth, this deck is designed to take control of the game early and close out matches before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on using aggressive Selesnya creatures like Guide of Souls, Leonardo, Cutting Edge, and Ocelot Pride to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes powerful support cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Brightglass Gearhulk to maintain tempo and control the board. The inclusion of cards like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Starfield Shepherd provide additional value and ways to protect the key creatures. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain a strong board presence to secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through a combination of hand disruption (Thoughtseize, Cling to Dust), removal spells (Fatal Push, Sheoldred's Edict), and counterspells (Counterspell, Force of Negation). It also utilizes creatures with powerful abilities such as Subtlety, Psychic Frog, and Quantum Riddler to control the board and generate card advantage. The deck aims to control the game's tempo, protect its key threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, and eventually close out the game with a strategic betrayal or Graveyard Trespasser.

This deck focuses on quickly and efficiently reanimating powerful creatures from the graveyard using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. It also utilizes a mix of disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect the combo while digging for the necessary pieces. Once the combo is assembled, the deck can quickly overwhelm the opponent with creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. The goal is to quickly set up the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan while creating a strong board presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly ramp up resources and take advantage of synergies between the cards. By combining cards like Mox Amber, Mishra's Bauble, and Urza's Saga with powerful creatures like Cori-Steel Cutter and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck can overwhelm opponents with early aggression and disrupt their game plan. Key cards like Grinding Station and Malevolent Rumble provide additional ways to control the board and finish off opponents quickly. The deck's strategy is to apply pressure and win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on using the Dredge mechanic to fill the graveyard with cards like Stinkweed Imp and Golgari Thug, fueling powerful graveyard-based combos. By using cards like Life from the Loam and Faithless Looting, the deck can continuously recycle and reuse key cards, allowing for explosive plays. The goal is to quickly fill the graveyard, trigger cards like Arclight Phoenix and Creeping Chill, and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of damage and card advantage. The deck is designed to be fast, aggressive, and resilient against disruption.

The deck revolves around utilizing artifacts and cheap creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By combining artifacts like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble with creatures like Memnite and Pinnacle Emissary, the deck aims to put early pressure on the opponent. Cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke help control the board while cards like Urza's Saga and Krang, Master Mind provide additional value and synergy with the artifact-based strategy. Overall, the deck focuses on efficiently deploying threats and disrupting the opponent's game plan to come out on top in 1 vs 1 matchups.

Utilizing the powerful UrzaTron lands, this deck focuses on ramping up to play big threats like Karn and Ugin while disrupting opponents with Thought-Knot Seer and Glaring Fleshraker. The deck aims to control the game through the use of powerful colorless spells and artifacts, ultimately overwhelming the opponent with massive Eldrazi creatures and game-changing planeswalkers. By efficiently managing resources and utilizing the Tron lands effectively, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents in a slow, methodical manner.

The main idea of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck focuses on dealing damage to the opponent as fast as possible while also having ways to control the board with cards like Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm. The deck also includes mana fixing cards like Sacred Foundry and Arid Mesa to ensure that it can cast its spells consistently. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to apply constant pressure and finish the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on applying pressure with fast and efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, and Guide of Souls. It also utilizes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to finish off opponents quickly. The deck includes disruption elements like Mana Tithe and Surgical Extraction to disrupt opponent's game plan and protect its own threats. The key strategy revolves around playing aggressively, maintaining board presence, and using efficient removal spells to control the pace of the game and come out on top.

The main concept of this Ruby Storm deck is to efficiently cast spells at a reduced cost using cards like Ruby Medallion, Manamorphose, and Desperate Ritual to generate mana. This allows the deck to chain together spells, drawing cards and dealing damage with Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot until the opponent is overwhelmed. Past in Flames allows for spells to be recast from the graveyard, maximizing the deck's potential. The deck also includes some card draw and filtering with Reckless Impulse and Valakut Awakening to maintain consistency and find key combo pieces.

This deck utilizes artifacts to constantly put pressure on the opponent and disrupt their strategy. By combining efficient creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Pinnacle Emissary with powerful artifact cards like Urza's Saga and Engineered Explosives, the deck creates a fast and aggressive game plan. Emry, Lurker of the Loch provides graveyard recursion while cards like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt help control the opponent's plays. The deck also includes some utility cards like Claws of Gix and Sink into Stupor to further disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a strong board presence.

The deck focuses on using cards like Street Wraith, Shardless Agent, and Endurance to fill the graveyard with creatures, then cast Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo finish. The deck also includes other creatures with cycling abilities to further fuel the graveyard, along with counterspells like Force of Negation for protection. The goal is to quickly set up the graveyard and cast Living End to overwhelm the opponent with a massive board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to disrupt your opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. You can control the board with cards like Ephemerate, Solitude, and Phelia, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Ragavan, Overlord of the Balemurk, and Pinnacle Monk to quickly close out the game. The deck also includes some powerful removal options like Prismatic Ending and Wrath of the Skies to deal with any threats your opponent may have. Overall, this deck aims to be proactive and disruptive, putting your opponent on the back foot while you take control of the game.

This deck focuses on using Birthing Ritual to ramp up quickly, while utilizing a mix of creatures and disruptive spells to control the board and put pressure on the opponent. By consistently ramping up its resources and disrupting the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory through a combination of aggression and control. The deck also includes strong card advantage engines like Shardless Agent and Coiling Oracle to maintain a steady stream of threats and answers throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By efficiently utilizing multicolored cards and mana fixing, it aims to consistently deal damage and control the board. The deck includes powerful creatures like Scion of Draco and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with versatile spells like Lightning Bolt and Tribal Flames. Leyline of the Guildpact helps to increase the deck's overall synergy and efficacy. By maintaining pressure and control throughout the game, this deck aims to swiftly defeat the opponent.
